annual_rate.notes: Prejudgment interest under Minn. Stat. § 549.09, subd. 1(b) — 4% (simple interest). This is PREjudgment interest (accruing before entry of judgment) and is separate from Minnesota’s post-judgment rate; availability is limited by claim type (see the page). Current formula value as of 2026-07-09; verify at revisor.mn.gov. Not legal advice.
